technical_specs.materials: Bamboo charcoal fiber inner fabric, BPA-free plastics, aluminum frame

climate_notes: The breathable bamboo charcoal insert helps regulate temperature. Suitable for Dubai summer heat if used with the optional UPF 50+ sunshade, but do not leave inside a parked car.
safety_notes: Anti-rebound bar crash technology. Failsafe mechanisms to prevent unintentional folding. Side impact protection.
manual_snippets: Ensure the handle is in the anti-rebound position when installed in a vehicle.
To transform from stroller to car seat, squeeze the handle button and push the wheels up until they click.
The car seat can be installed with or without the ISOFIX base using a 3-point vehicle seat belt.
Do not add any aftermarket padding or inserts under the child.
Always ensure the harness is snug, allowing only one finger to fit between the strap and the child's collarbone.
customer_reviews: Absolutely perfect for travel. Fit perfectly in our Nissan Patrol and was a breeze to navigate through Dubai airport.
Love the convenience, but it is a bit heavy (7.5kg) to carry if you are walking up stairs.
We took it on Emirates airline and it fit in the cabin just fine. Made the flight with our newborn so much easier.
In the UAE summer heat, the baby does get a little sweaty, but the sun canopy is huge and offers great shade.
Very safe and sturdy. The ISOFIX base clicks in securely. Definitely worth the price for the convenience of not carrying a separate stroller.
